creatives.niche_raw: makers, hobbyist programmers, keychain/EDC gadget collectors, kids and beginners learning to code
creatives.angle_raw: impossibly tiny but fully real — the charm of extreme miniaturization; best friend for your keys

claims: Thumby™ is an itty-bitty game system at the tips of your thumbs, a best friend for your keys, and an easy learning tool all-in-one
Start playing right away with preloaded games

mechanism: MicroPython implementation of Python 3 optimized to run on microcontrollers

notes: Thumby leads with extreme miniaturization ('world's smallest / itty-bitty') as the headline novelty. Dual pitch: EDC charm object AND learn-to-code tool. Kickstarter funded 2021, 13x goal, 4,502 backers. Third-party press quotes ('Probably the World's Smallest Game Console' — Nintendo Life) used as trust signals. No explicit transformation promise — novelty + community are the leads.
